ALPAKA: Thank you for your purchase! Your order number is 472684. View more information about your order here: https://alpaka.attn.tv/a6QepDKZetBA .
ALPAKA: Thank you for your purchase! Your order number is 472684. View more information about your order here: https://alpaka.attn.tv/a2UwcT7Z2IYb .

ALPAKA: Hey Tony, thanks for your order! Did you know that you can earn points on every purchase when you join our rewards program? All you need to do is create an account to start earning today. https://alpaka.attn.tv/a-jqZyMf3iAX
I dont care about points...why hasn't you shipped the backpack yet??!?
Haven't

ALPAKA: Thanks for reaching out, and I'm so sorry for the inconvenience. Are you referring to Order #472684? If so, I can see here on my side that it is on it's way. Have you received tracking information yet? If not please be sure to check your inbox, spam and promo folders as our emails end up there sometimes.
Tracking has stated that they are waiting on information since 8/21

ALPAKA: I'm sorry to hear that. Our processing time takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS and FedEx. Once shipped, it will take 7-10 business days. We still anticipate delivery within the estimated shipping timeframe based on the selected shipping method. 

Should you need further assistance, please don't hesitate to text me.

Why is it taking so long to get what i ordered?  I have 3 weeks of travel in a row coming up.  It shows in tracking that my backpack has been sitting in New York for the past 7 days.  
Can you ship this to me overnight?

472684

ALPAKA: I'm sorry for the delay! Please allow some time, as our processing typically takes 1-2 business days. We usually ship via USPS, UPS, or FedEx, and once your order is on its way, delivery generally takes 7-10 business days.

Please let me know if you need further assistance. I'm just a click away.
You must be a bot...you gave me the same answer 4 days ago
Template used: "Shipping Time"; last updated: 2024-05-17 15:36:48.745

ALPAKA: I'm unfortunately I'm not a bot. I'm a real live person speaking to you on the other side of this conversation. I am very sorry for the delay regarding your package. I can't imagine your frustration. Your package is on it's way. Our processing time takes 1-2 business days. Once shipped, it will take 7-10 business days. Please note that business days do not include Saturdays or Sundays. I hope I have eased your mind a little bit. Is there anything else that I can help you while I still have you here?
